docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERRA, ODELL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY FONSECA, XIOMARA AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERRA, ODELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONSECA, XIOMARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABRERRA, ODELL $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
